import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def process_order(order):
    logger.info("Processing order %s", order["id"])
    total = calculate_total(order)
    logger.info("Order %s total: %.2f", order["id"], total)
    return total


def calculate_total(order):
    logger.debug("Order items: %s", order.get("items"))
    return sum(item["price"] for item in order.get("items", []))


def sync_inventory(products):
    for product in products:
        logger.info("Syncing %s", product["name"])
        update_stock(product)
    logger.info("Inventory sync complete")


def update_stock(product):
    pass
